title: Dyeable Shulkers
description: This mod lets you dye shulkers and shulker boxes!
body:
# Dyeable Shulkers

---

Dyeable Shulkers is a **server-side** mod, clients don't need to install it.


## Shulker Boxes

You can dye shulker boxes directly on ground without breaking them...

![Dye Shulker Box](https://github.com/kgriff0n/dyeable-shulkers/raw/1.20/img/dye-shulker-box.gif)  
*as of version 1.2.1, a brush is used instead of a water bucket to clean shulkers*

...and even rename it !

![Rename Shulker](https://github.com/kgriff0n/dyeable-shulkers/raw/1.20/img/rename-shulker.gif)

## Shulker Entities

You can also dye shulkers.

![Dye Shulkers](https://github.com/kgriff0n/dyeable-shulkers/raw/1.20/img/dye-shulkers.gif)

---

Since **version 1.1.0**, you can enable and disable some functionalities with the `/dyeable-shulkers` command or by editing the `dyeable-shulkers.properties` file in the `config` folder.
